pages_crawled.title: Contact Us - CuriousJr
pages_crawled.meta_desc: Contact CuriousJr powered by Physicswallah for queries, feedback, complaints, and concerns about courses and programs.
headings: Welcome to CuriousJr powered by Physicswallah!
pages_crawled.key_content: Welcome to CuriousJr powered by Physicswallah! We are India's leading student-oriented Edtech organization, dedicated to addressing your queries, feedback, complaints, and concerns about our courses and programs. Call Us 8448828113 (11am to 8pm - Monday to Sunday). If lines are busy, please try again after 15 minutes. Email Us cjr_support@pw.live. We aim to resolve all queries within 7 days.

pages_crawled.title: CuriousJr Blog
pages_crawled.meta_desc: Discover expert parenting tips, creative learning hacks, brain-boosting puzzles, fun games, and tuition insights—making education exciting, interactive, and engaging for young learners and their families!
pages_crawled.key_content: At CuriousJr by PW, we believe that learning isn't just about books and exams—it's an adventure! Blog topics: Parenting Hacks, Fun & Learning (activities, puzzles, brain teasers), Tuition Insights, Olympiad & Exam Prep. Quick Access: Curriculum Courses, Mental Math Course, English by Cambridge, Activity Kits.

founder_note: At Physicswallah, we believe education transforms lives. We're proud of the difference we've made, and now we're focusing on the foundational years - the time when a child's love of learning begins.
